---
name: Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements, corrections, or additions to the Circuit Bench documentation.
title: "[DOCS]: "
labels: ["documentation", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

# Documentation Improvement

Thank you for helping improve the Circuit Bench documentation.

Clear, accurate, and complete documentation makes the project more accessible to researchers, engineers, educators, and contributors.

---

## Summary

Provide a brief description of the documentation issue or improvement.

---

## Type of Documentation

Select all that apply.

- [ ] README
- [ ] Installation Guide
- [ ] User Guide
- [ ] API Documentation
- [ ] Developer Guide
- [ ] Contributing Guide
- [ ] Benchmark Documentation
- [ ] Dataset Documentation
- [ ] Examples / Tutorials
- [ ] Code Comments / Docstrings
- [ ] Continuous Integration
- [ ] Other

---

## Current Documentation

Provide a link or file path.

Example:

```
README.md

or

docs/getting_started.md
```

---

## Problem

Describe what is incorrect, unclear, outdated, or missing.

---

## Suggested Improvement

Describe how the documentation should be improved.

If possible, provide replacement text.

```text
Write your proposed documentation here.
```

---

## Why is this Important?

Explain how this improvement would benefit users or contributors.

Examples:

- Easier installation
- Better reproducibility
- Improved onboarding
- More accurate API usage
- Better benchmark interpretation
- Improved scientific transparency

---

## Related Code or Feature

If applicable, reference the relevant module, function, benchmark, or feature.

Example:

```
src/circuitbench/benchmark.py
```

or

```
README.md
```

---

## References

If applicable, include links to:

- Academic papers
- Standards
- External documentation
- Specifications
- Tutorials

---

## Additional Context

Include screenshots, diagrams, or examples if they help explain the improvement.

---

# Checklist

Please confirm the following before submitting.

- [ ] I searched existing issues before creating this request.
- [ ] I identified the affected documentation.
- [ ] My suggestion improves clarity, accuracy, or completeness.
- [ ] I have verified any technical information included.
- [ ] I am willing to submit a pull request if needed.

---

Thank you for helping make Circuit Bench easier to learn, use, and contribute to.
